title: Synthetic fixture: docs-only PR (Documents/Design + SKILL.md, no commands/*.md)
body:
## Summary

Docs-only changeset: updates to Documents/Design/foo.md and skills/frame-credit-emission/SKILL.md.
Deliberately does not touch commands/*.md so touchesCliSurface() is false (AC4, S1).

<!-- pipeline-metrics
metrics_version: 4
credits:
  - port: implement-code
    status: not-applicable
    evidence: "changeset.touchesTestableCodeOrTests() is false for this docs-only PR."
  - port: implement-test
    status: not-applicable
    evidence: "changeset.touchesTestableCodeOrTests() is false for this docs-only PR."
  - port: implement-refactor
    status: not-applicable
    evidence: "changeset.touchedAreaHasDebt() is false for this docs-only PR."
  - port: implement-docs
    status: passed
    evidence: "Doc-Keeper validated: Documents/Design/foo.md and skills/frame-credit-emission/SKILL.md updated."
  - port: ce-gate-cli
    status: not-applicable
    evidence: "changeset.touchesCliSurface() is false; no commands/*.md touched."
  - port: ce-gate-browser
    status: not-applicable
    evidence: "changeset.touchesBrowserSurface() is false."
  - port: ce-gate-canvas
    status: not-applicable
    evidence: "changeset.touchesCanvasSurface() is false."
  - port: ce-gate-api
    status: not-applicable
    evidence: "changeset.touchesApiSurface() is false."
